---
title: "About"
image: assets/logo-square.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/codetricity
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/craigoda/
    - icon: rss
      text: RSS
      href: index.xml

---

## Oda World

**Oda World** is a personal blog about technology, innovation, and ideas across borders.

The focus here is on work and thinking that doesn't stay in one lane — software and systems, design and product, and the connections between cultures, tools, and ways of building.

### What you'll find here

- Notes on tools, workflows, and software
- Reflections on innovation, design, and craft
- Ideas worth sharing — from experiments, projects, and conversations

If something here sparks a thought or a conversation, that's the whole point.
